revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Short description|Tag for templates and modules}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{No subst}} {{tsh|nodoc}} == Usage == For use on '''template/module documentation pages''' whose content is missing, insufficient, incomplete and/or inaccurate. *If the template already has a documentation subpage, place this template in that subpage before the first heading. Example: *:{{tlc|Documentation subpage}}
{{Tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
==Usage== *If the template ''does not'' have a documentation subpage, place this template at the end of the main template code, wrapped in {{tag|noinclude}} tags. Example: *:... main template code ...
}}
{{tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The template adds pages to [[:Category:Templates with missing or incorrect documentation]]. ==TemplateData== { "params": { "talk": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Has details on talk page", "description": "Shows \"See the talk page for details\" if a value is supplied", "type": "boolean" }, "date": { "autovalue": "May 2025", "label": "Date", "description": "Date tagged", "type": "string" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "Displays in the message text, prefaced with \"Reason:...\", to indicate what needs improving.", "example": "too technical to understand.", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Tags templates with inadequate or nonexistent documentation.", "format": "block" } == See also == * {{tl|Documentation}} * [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] * {{tlg|Ombox}} the template transcluded into this one. It provides the basic framework. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Template documentation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Short description|Tag for templates and modules}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{No subst}} {{tsh|nodoc}} == Usage == For use on '''template/module documentation pages''' whose content is missing, insufficient, incomplete and/or inaccurate. *If the template already has a documentation subpage, place this template in that subpage before the first heading. Example: *:{{tlc|Documentation subpage}}
{{Tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
==Usage== *If the template ''does not'' have a documentation subpage, place this template at the end of the main template code, wrapped in {{tag|noinclude}} tags. Example: *:... main template code ...
}}
{{tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The template adds pages to [[:Category:Templates with missing or incorrect documentation]]. ==TemplateData== { "params": { "talk": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Has details on talk page", "description": "Shows \"See the talk page for details\" if a value is supplied", "type": "boolean" }, "date": { "autovalue": "May 2025", "label": "Date", "description": "Date tagged", "type": "string" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "Displays in the message text, prefaced with \"Reason:...\", to indicate what needs improving.", "example": "too technical to understand.", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Tags templates with inadequate or nonexistent documentation.", "format": "block" } == See also == * {{tl|Documentation}} * [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] * {{tlg|Ombox}} the template transcluded into this one. It provides the basic framework. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Template documentation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Short description|Tag for templates and modules}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{No subst}} {{tsh|nodoc}} == Usage == For use on '''template/module documentation pages''' whose content is missing, insufficient, incomplete and/or inaccurate. *If the template already has a documentation subpage, place this template in that subpage before the first heading. Example: *:{{tlc|Documentation subpage}}
{{Tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
==Usage== *If the template ''does not'' have a documentation subpage, place this template at the end of the main template code, wrapped in {{tag|noinclude}} tags. Example: *:... main template code ...
}}
{{tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The template adds pages to [[:Category:Templates with missing or incorrect documentation]]. ==TemplateData== { "params": { "talk": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Has details on talk page", "description": "Shows \"See the talk page for details\" if a value is supplied", "type": "boolean" }, "date": { "autovalue": "May 2025", "label": "Date", "description": "Date tagged", "type": "string" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "Displays in the message text, prefaced with \"Reason:...\", to indicate what needs improving.", "example": "too technical to understand.", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Tags templates with inadequate or nonexistent documentation.", "format": "block" } == See also == * {{tl|Documentation}} * [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] * {{tlg|Ombox}} the template transcluded into this one. It provides the basic framework. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Template documentation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Short description|Tag for templates and modules}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{No subst}} {{tsh|nodoc}} == Usage == For use on '''template/module documentation pages''' whose content is missing, insufficient, incomplete and/or inaccurate. *If the template already has a documentation subpage, place this template in that subpage before the first heading. Example: *:{{tlc|Documentation subpage}}
{{Tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
==Usage== *If the template ''does not'' have a documentation subpage, place this template at the end of the main template code, wrapped in {{tag|noinclude}} tags. Example: *:... main template code ...
}}
{{tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The template adds pages to [[:Category:Templates with missing or incorrect documentation]]. ==TemplateData== { "params": { "talk": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Has details on talk page", "description": "Shows \"See the talk page for details\" if a value is supplied", "type": "boolean" }, "date": { "autovalue": "May 2025", "label": "Date", "description": "Date tagged", "type": "string" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "Displays in the message text, prefaced with \"Reason:...\", to indicate what needs improving.", "example": "too technical to understand.", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Tags templates with inadequate or nonexistent documentation.", "format": "block" } == See also == * {{tl|Documentation}} * [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] * {{tlg|Ombox}} the template transcluded into this one. It provides the basic framework. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Template documentation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Short description|Tag for templates and modules}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{No subst}} {{tsh|nodoc}} == Usage == For use on '''template/module documentation pages''' whose content is missing, insufficient, incomplete and/or inaccurate. *If the template already has a documentation subpage, place this template in that subpage before the first heading. Example: *:{{tlc|Documentation subpage}}
{{Tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
==Usage== *If the template ''does not'' have a documentation subpage, place this template at the end of the main template code, wrapped in {{tag|noinclude}} tags. Example: *:... main template code ...
}}
{{tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The template adds pages to [[:Category:Templates with missing or incorrect documentation]]. ==TemplateData== { "params": { "talk": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Has details on talk page", "description": "Shows \"See the talk page for details\" if a value is supplied", "type": "boolean" }, "date": { "autovalue": "May 2025", "label": "Date", "description": "Date tagged", "type": "string" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "Displays in the message text, prefaced with \"Reason:...\", to indicate what needs improving.", "example": "too technical to understand.", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Tags templates with inadequate or nonexistent documentation.", "format": "block" } == See also == * {{tl|Documentation}} * [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] * {{tlg|Ombox}} the template transcluded into this one. It provides the basic framework. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Template documentation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Short description|Tag for templates and modules}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{No subst}} {{tsh|nodoc}} == Usage == For use on '''template/module documentation pages''' whose content is missing, insufficient, incomplete and/or inaccurate. *If the template already has a documentation subpage, place this template in that subpage before the first heading. Example: *:{{tlc|Documentation subpage}}
{{Tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
==Usage== *If the template ''does not'' have a documentation subpage, place this template at the end of the main template code, wrapped in {{tag|noinclude}} tags. Example: *:... main template code ...
}}
{{tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The template adds pages to [[:Category:Templates with missing or incorrect documentation]]. ==TemplateData== { "params": { "talk": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Has details on talk page", "description": "Shows \"See the talk page for details\" if a value is supplied", "type": "boolean" }, "date": { "autovalue": "May 2025", "label": "Date", "description": "Date tagged", "type": "string" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "Displays in the message text, prefaced with \"Reason:...\", to indicate what needs improving.", "example": "too technical to understand.", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Tags templates with inadequate or nonexistent documentation.", "format": "block" } == See also == * {{tl|Documentation}} * [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] * {{tlg|Ombox}} the template transcluded into this one. It provides the basic framework. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Template documentation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Short description|Tag for templates and modules}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{No subst}} {{tsh|nodoc}} == Usage == For use on '''template/module documentation pages''' whose content is missing, insufficient, incomplete and/or inaccurate. *If the template already has a documentation subpage, place this template in that subpage before the first heading. Example: *:{{tlc|Documentation subpage}}
{{Tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
==Usage== *If the template ''does not'' have a documentation subpage, place this template at the end of the main template code, wrapped in {{tag|noinclude}} tags. Example: *:... main template code ...
}}
{{tlx|Improve documentation|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The template adds pages to [[:Category:Templates with missing or incorrect documentation]]. ==TemplateData== { "params": { "talk": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Has details on talk page", "description": "Shows \"See the talk page for details\" if a value is supplied", "type": "boolean" }, "date": { "autovalue": "May 2025", "label": "Date", "description": "Date tagged", "type": "string" }, "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "Displays in the message text, prefaced with \"Reason:...\", to indicate what needs improving.", "example": "too technical to understand.", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Tags templates with inadequate or nonexistent documentation.", "format": "block" } == See also == * {{tl|Documentation}} * [[Wikipedia:Template documentation]] * {{tlg|Ombox}} the template transcluded into this one. It provides the basic framework. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Template documentation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Request templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
